title: Plug & Play Survival
body:
# 🔧 Core Philosophy
- Minimal Configuration, Maximum Performance
- while enhancing survival mechanics with curated QoL tools. All mods are pre-configured for stability and vanilla parity.

## 🧩 Modular Feature Breakdown

- **Vanilla Integrity Preservation**  
  No gameplay-altering mechanics

- **Maintenance Guarantee**  
  Auto-update pipeline for critical mods (Sodium/Lithium/Fabric API)

- **MASA Ecosystem Integration**
> MiniHUD: Real-time coordinates • Biome data • Light levels

> Tweakeroo: Freecam • Precision placement • Grid snapping

> Litematica: Schematic visualization

- **Critical Fixes & Optimizations**
> Cull Leaves: Foliage rendering optimization

> ImmediatelyFast: UI rendering acceleration

> No Chat Reports: Privacy enforcement
